symptom: a chest that visibly caved inward at the breastbone since the teenage years
hook: the heart looked shoved to the left and the front of the chest seemed to vanish into a hollow
whatYouSee: The breastbone is sunken inward which shifts the heart to the left and blurs the right heart border.
whyItMatters: It is the most common chest wall deformity and is usually cosmetic but a severe funnel can compress the heart and lungs and reduce exercise tolerance.
treatment: Mild cases are observed; significant deformity is corrected surgically with a bar that lifts the sternum.
takeaway: A sunken breastbone shifting the heart left with a blurred right heart border is pectus excavatum.

condition.symptom: a chest that visibly caved inward at the breastbone since the teenage years
condition.hook: the heart looked shoved to the left and the front of the chest seemed to vanish into a hollow
condition.keyFindings: a depressed sternum pushing the heart to the left with a blurred right heart border on the frontal film and an obvious posterior sternal depression on the lateral

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a chest that visibly caved inward at the breastbone since the teenage years.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And the heart looked shoved to the left and the front of the chest seemed to vanish into a hollow.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Pectus excavatum

👀 What you see:
The breastbone is sunken inward which shifts the heart to the left and blurs the right heart border.

🦴 Why it matters:
It is the most common chest wall deformity and is usually cosmetic but a severe funnel can compress the heart and lungs and reduce exercise tolerance.

📝 Takeaway:
A sunken breastbone shifting the heart left with a blurred right heart border is pectus excavatum.
